description: Rename project from Painkiller to GRID, introduce Module Registry and Crash Boundary interfaces, create :shared module, create :feature:import dynamic feature module structure, and restructure settings.gradle.kts and build files for the new modular architecture.
steps: 1. Update settings.gradle.kts: change rootProject.name from 'Painkiller' to 'GRID', add includes for :shared and :feature:import
2. Update build.gradle.kts (root): add android.dynamic-feature plugin alias if needed for dynamic feature modules
3. Update gradle/libs.versions.toml: add android-dynamic-feature plugin entry (same AGP version 8.7.3)
4. Create shared/build.gradle.kts as a pure Kotlin/JVM module (like :domain) with kotlin-jvm and kotlin-serialization plugins, depending on kotlinx-serialization-json and kotlinx-coroutines-core

5. Create shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/registry/FeatureEntry.kt - the FeatureEntry interface that feature modules implement to register with the core. Include: val id: FeatureId, val displayName: String, suspend fun execute(intent: UserIntent): Outcome, fun composableEntry(): (@Composable () -> Unit)?. Also define FeatureId as a value class wrapping String, UserIntent data class, and Outcome sealed class.

6. Create shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/registry/ModuleRegistry.kt - the registry that holds registered modules, allows get(id), register(entry), disable(id, reason), listActive(), listDisabled(). Thread-safe with ConcurrentHashMap.

7. Create shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/crash/CrashBoundary.kt - executeFeature(id, intent) that wraps module.execute(intent) in runCatching, on failure calls registry.disable(id, reason=it) and returns Result.failure. As specified in GRID-ARCHITECTURE.md.

8. Create shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/config/ConfigLoader.kt - loads JSON WorkflowTemplate objects from an embedded path (classpath resource) and an external path (File-based). Uses kotlinx.serialization. Defines WorkflowTemplate data class with id, displayName, description fields. Has replaceAll(templates) for hot-swap.
9. Create shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/config/TemplateRegistry.kt - holds loaded templates, provides getById(id), listAll(), replaceAll(templates).

10. Create feature/import/build.gradle.kts as a com.android.dynamic-feature module. namespace = 'com.grid.feature.import_pipeline', depends on :app (base), :domain, :shared. Includes same dependencies as current :app for SAF/Ktor/security (the feature code needs them).

11. Create feature/import/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with <manifest xmlns:android='http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android'><dist:module dist:instant='false' dist:title='@string/title_import'><dist:fusing dist:include='true'/></dist:module></manifest>

12. Move all files from app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/data/files/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/data/files/ - update package declarations to com.grid.feature.import_pipeline.data.files
13. Move all files from app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/data/github/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/data/github/ - update package declarations
14. Move all files from app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/data/security/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/data/security/ - update package declarations
15. Move all files from app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/data/settings/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/data/settings/ - update package declarations
16. Move all files from app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/data/zip/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/data/zip/ - update package declarations
17. Move app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ui/auth/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ui/auth/ - update package declarations
18. Move app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ui/flow/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ui/flow/ - update package declarations
19. Move app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ui/repotree/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ui/repotree/ - update package declarations
20. Move app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ui/screens/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ui/screens/ - update package declarations
21. Move app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ui/preview/ to feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ui/preview/ - update package declarations

22. Create feature/import/src/main/java/com/grid/feature/import_pipeline/ImportFeatureEntry.kt implementing FeatureEntry - registers this module's composable entry point and execute function. This is a dummy/proof-of-concept that proves the registration pattern works.
23. Create feature/import/src/main/res/values/strings.xml with <string name='title_import'>Import</string>

24. Update app/build.gradle.kts: change namespace to 'com.grid.app', add dynamicFeatures = listOf(':feature:import'), add dependency on :shared, remove dependencies that moved to :feature:import (ktor, security-crypto, datastore, document-file). Keep compose, navigation, lifecycle, core, splashscreen.

25. Refactor app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/PainkillerApplication.kt -> app/src/main/java/com/grid/app/GridApplication.kt: rename class to GridApplication, inject ModuleRegistry, initialize CrashBoundary and ConfigLoader on startup. Remove old PainkillerContainer reference - replace with a slim GridContainer that only holds shell-level dependencies (no feature code).
26. Refactor app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/MainActivity.kt -> app/src/main/java/com/grid/app/MainActivity.kt: update to use GridApplication, GridTheme, GridNavGraph.

27. Refactor app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/di/PainkillerContainer.kt -> app/src/main/java/com/grid/app/di/GridContainer.kt: strip all feature-level dependencies (github repos, SAF readers, etc). Keep only: ModuleRegistry instance, CrashBoundary instance, ConfigLoader instance. The feature module will have its own container.

28. Rename theme files: PainkillerTheme -> GridTheme, PainkillerColors -> GridColors, PainkillerTypography -> GridTypography, PainkillerShapes -> GridShapes, PainkillerSpacing -> GridSpacing. Update all references in remaining :app files.

29. Rename PainkillerNavGraph -> GridNavGraph in app/src/main/java/com/grid/app/ui/navigation/GridNavGraph.kt. Simplify it to just show a shell screen (no feature-specific routes - those will be loaded dynamically from registered modules). Keep a placeholder home route that shows registered modules.

30. Rename UI components: PainkillerErrorBanner -> GridErrorBanner, PainkillerInfoCard -> GridInfoCard, PainkillerPrimaryActionButton -> GridPrimaryActionButton, PainkillerSeverityBadge -> GridSeverityBadge, PainkillerWarningCard -> GridWarningCard. Move to com.grid.app.ui.components package.
31. Update AndroidManifest.xml: android:name='.GridApplication', update theme references if needed.
32. Update app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml if any string references need updating.
33. Remove the old app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ directory tree (all files should be either moved to feature/import or refactored into com/grid/app).
34. Move app/src/test/java/com/painkiller/ test files: SmokeTest.kt stays in :app (updated package to com.grid.app), github API tests move to feature/import/src/test/.

35. Update domain module package references if needed (domain stays as com.painkiller.domain for now to avoid massive churn - the domain module is independent and referenced by both :app and :feature:import).
36. Create shared/src/test/kotlin/com/grid/shared/registry/ModuleRegistryTest.kt - test register, get, disable, listActive, listDisabled.
37. Create shared/src/test/kotlin/com/grid/shared/crash/CrashBoundaryTest.kt - test that a crashing module gets disabled and rest continues.

38. Verify: no feature code (SAF, GitHub API, upload flow, auth) remains in :app. Only shell infrastructure: Application, Activity, Theme, Navigation shell, Components, DI container with registry/boundary/config.
acceptance_criteria: ModuleRegistry allows registering FeatureEntry instances, disabling them, and listing active/disabled
CrashBoundary wraps module execution in runCatching, disables module on failure, returns Result.failure
ConfigLoader can load WorkflowTemplate objects from embedded JSON
:shared module compiles as pure Kotlin/JVM (no Android dependencies)
:feature:import module contains all moved feature code with updated packages
:app contains only shell code: GridApplication, MainActivity, GridContainer, GridTheme, GridNavGraph, shared components
No feature-specific code (SAF readers, GitHub API calls, upload flow, auth screens) remains in :app
ImportFeatureEntry in :feature:import implements FeatureEntry and can register with ModuleRegistry
ModuleRegistryTest and CrashBoundaryTest verify the core registry and crash isolation behavior
verification: Verify settings.gradle.kts contains rootProject.name = "GRID" and all module includes
Verify no .kt files under app/src/main reference SAF, Ktor HTTP client calls, or GitHub API directly
Verify shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/registry/ModuleRegistry.kt exists and has register/get/disable methods
Verify shared/src/main/kotlin/com/grid/shared/crash/CrashBoundary.kt exists with executeFeature wrapping runCatching
Verify feature/import/build.gradle.kts exists as dynamic-feature module
Verify shared/src/test/kotlin/com/grid/shared/registry/ModuleRegistryTest.kt and CrashBoundaryTest.kt exist with meaningful test logic
findings: No Android SDK available so build/test verification could not be run. All changes are structural and syntax-verified. The domain module stays at com.painkiller.domain package as planned. The version catalog uses android-dynamic-feature plugin entry (AGP 8.7.3). CI will be the authoritative build verifier. Review fixes applied: TemplateRegistry atomic swap, ModuleRegistry StateFlow, reactive NavGraph, ServiceLoader-based discovery in GridApplication, ConfigLoader Result return type. XML resource rename (issue #5) deferred as cosmetic only.
